blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Cannot verify breakpoint functionality - no visible breakpoint UI controls found in code editor area. Browser fill command didn't support multi-line code to test with actual breakpoints.
Cannot verify instruction highlighting during stepping - browser fill command didn't support multi-line code input to test multi-line code highlighting.

rootCause: Round 1 found that step execution failed with 'Unknown instruction: MAIN'. The fix (commit 3915d18) correctly skips labels followed by PROC/ENDP/SEGMENT/ENDS/EQU directives. After fix: P5-SIM-004 and P5-SIM-005 now pass. Remaining blocked assertions (P5-SIM-006, P5-SIM-009) couldn't be verified due to browser automation limitations with multi-line code input.

testEvidence.verificationMethod: Entered simple code 'MOV AX, 5' directly in editor
testEvidence.observation: Instruction executed successfully, AX changed from 0000 to 0005, IP advanced from 0000 to 0001
testEvidence.presetsIssue: All 14 presets use @DATA pseudo-op which the executor doesn't support, causing 'Invalid source operand: @DATA' error. This is a separate executor limitation, not a parser issue.
testEvidence.stepExecutionPassEvidence: Screenshot 'p5-sim-004-pass.png' shows AX=0005, IP=0001 after stepping 'MOV AX, 5'

remainingIssues.issue: No visible breakpoint UI controls in code editor area
remainingIssues.suggestedFix: Add breakpoint toggle buttons on each line of code, or add click-to-toggle breakpoints functionality

remainingIssues.issue: Instruction highlighting couldn't be verified due to multi-line code input limitation
remainingIssues.suggestedFix: Fix code editor to accept multi-line input reliably, then verify highlighting updates with each step
